reason: This is a high-quality sample with a coherent planner blueprint that sequences 4 logical goals (health check → search → retrieve details → timeline analysis). The synthetic user behaves naturally, asking follow-up questions that build on previous responses without using tool jargon. The assistant correctly uses all four tool types (memory_health, memory_search, memory_get, memory_timeline), stays grounded in visible tool outputs, and provides useful pattern analysis. All four blueprint goals are fully completed in the trajectory. The assistant faithfully reports tool outputs without fabricating details, and any data inconsistencies in the memory system are part of the tool responses themselves, not hallucinated content.
